title: Filtering, Three-Valued Logic, Patterns, Ordering, and Pagination · Cardinality Forensics
summary: A queue view must include the correct unresolved tickets, handle missing owners, and remain deterministic across pages. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a deterministic queue-filter query suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defen…
objectives: Combine comparison, range, membership, and boolean predicates with explicit grouping.
Predict TRUE, FALSE, and UNKNOWN through comparisons and boolean operators involving NULL.
Use IS NULL, IS NOT NULL, COALESCE, and NULLIF only when their business meaning is justified.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Order Limit Pagination
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable SQLite increment headed "-- Evidence: sql-order-limit-pagination-h11ehp" with a concrete grain, hypothesis, or prediction; predicate, NULL logic, pattern, or deterministic-order evidence; and an observation, reconciliation, or verification tied to returned rows, changed rows, an error, or a plan.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Order Limit Pagination.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Order Limit Pagination into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Order Limit Pagination, keep Order Limit Pagination connected to executable relational evidence.

content.code:
-- Evidence: sql-order-limit-pagination-h11ehp
-- grain: declare the exact row or mutation grain before running
SELECT ticket_id, owner_id, owner_id = 1 AS owner_is_one
FROM tickets
WHERE owner_id = 1 OR owner_id IS NULL
ORDER BY ticket_id;
-- observation: reconcile the returned rows, changed count, error, or plan with the prediction
